content.problemStatement:
You are given a string sss consisting of lowercase English letters. You can convert sss into a **palindrome** by adding characters **only at the beginning** of the string.

Your task is to **find the shortest palindrome** that can be obtained using this transformation.

Function DeclarationFunction NameshortestPalindromeshortestPalindromeshortestPalindrome вҖ“ This function finds the shortest palindrome that can be formed by adding characters **only at the beginning** of the given string.

Parameters
sss : A string consisting of lowercase English letters.
Return Value
Returns a string representing the **shortest palindrome** that can be obtained by adding characters only at the beginning of sss.
Constraints
1вүӨTвүӨ1001 \leq T \leq 1001вүӨTвүӨ100
0вүӨвҲЈsвҲЈвүӨ5Г—1040 \leq |s| \leq 5 \times 10^40вүӨвҲЈsвҲЈвүӨ5Г—104
sss consists of lowercase English letters only
content.outputFormat:
Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT вҖ” the number of test cases.
Each of the next TTT lines contains a single string sss.


Output Format

For each test case, print a single line containing the shortest palindrome that can be formed.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1: "race" -> Add "eca" at the beginning -> "ecarace" is a palindrome.
Test case 2: "level" -> Already a palindrome, so output is the same -> "level".
Test case 3: "xyz" -> Add "zyx" at the beginning -> "zyxyz" is the shortest palindrome.
